attributes.description: Production monitoring dashboard for Anthropic API token consumption and rate limit visibility across all workspaces and models. Covers token usage (input, cache, output) and rate limit headroom (RPM, ITPM, OTPM) per model. For cost reporting see the dedicated Cost & Billing dashboard.

embeddableConfig.content:
## Anthropic — Usage & Rate Limit Monitor
Real-time and historical visibility into **token consumption** and **rate limit headroom** across all Claude models, workspaces, and service tiers (`standard` · `batch` · `priority`).

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS total_input_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens)

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS total_input_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens)

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Output Tokens` = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens)

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS `Total Output Tokens` = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens)

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour), anthropic.usage.model | SORT @timestamp ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour), anthropic.usage.model | SORT @timestamp ASC

attributes.title: Total Tokens Over Time by Model

embeddableConfig.title: Total Tokens Over Time by Model

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT total_tokens DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT total_tokens DESC | LIMIT 10

attributes.title: Most Used Models by Total Tokens (Top 10)

embeddableConfig.title: Most Used Models by Total Tokens (Top 10)

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS uncached = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) | EVAL total = uncached + cached + cache_creation, `Cache Hit Rate` = cached * 1.0 / total

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS uncached = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) | EVAL total = uncached + cached + cache_creation, `Cache Hit Rate` = cached * 1.0 / total
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS `Active Workspaces` = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.usage.workspace_id)
FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS `Active Workspaces` = COUNT_DISTINCT(anthropic.usage.workspace_id)

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour) | SORT @timestamp ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 hour) | SORT @timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Token Usage Over Time (Hourly) — Uncached Input, Cached Input, Cache Creation, Output

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.service_tier IS NOT NULL | STATS total_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), total_output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.service_tier | SORT total_input DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.service_tier IS NOT NULL | STATS total_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), total_output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.service_tier | SORT total_input DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Token Usage by Service Tier — Input vs Output (Stacked)

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.workspace_id | SORT total_tokens DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS total_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.workspace_id | SORT total_tokens DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT uncached_input DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT uncached_input DESC

attributes.title: Total Tokens by Model — Uncached Input, Cached Input, Cache Creation & Output

embeddableConfig.title: Total Tokens by Model — Uncached Input, Cached Input, Cache Creation & Output

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS `Uncached Input` = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), `Cached Input` = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), `Cache Creation` = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) | EVAL `Token Type` = "Input Tokens"

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL | STATS `Uncached Input` = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), `Cached Input` = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), `Cache Creation` = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens) | EVAL `Token Type` = "Input Tokens"

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model, anthropic.usage.workspace_id, anthropic.usage.service_tier | SORT uncached_input DESC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | STATS uncached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens), cached_input = SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens), cache_creation = SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens), output_tokens = SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) BY anthropic.usage.model, anthropic.usage.workspace_id, anthropic.usage.service_tier | SORT uncached_input DESC

attributes.title: Token Usage by Model, Workspace, and Service Tier

embeddableConfig.title: Token Usage by Model, Workspace, and Service Tier

query.esql: FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.rate_limit-* | WHERE anthropic.rate_limit.group_type == "model_group" | MV_EXPAND anthropic.rate_limit.models | WHERE anthropic.rate_limit.models IS NOT NULL | STATS itpm_cache = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.input_tokens_per_minute_cache_aware), otpm = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.output_tokens_per_minute), rpm = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.requests_per_minute) BY model = anthropic.rate_limit.models | RENAME itpm_cache AS `ITPM — cached + uncached`, otpm AS `OTPM`, rpm AS `RPM`, model AS `Model` | SORT `Model` ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.rate_limit-* | WHERE anthropic.rate_limit.group_type == "model_group" | MV_EXPAND anthropic.rate_limit.models | WHERE anthropic.rate_limit.models IS NOT NULL | STATS itpm_cache = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.input_tokens_per_minute_cache_aware), otpm = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.output_tokens_per_minute), rpm = MAX(anthropic.rate_limit.requests_per_minute) BY model = anthropic.rate_limit.models | RENAME itpm_cache AS `ITPM — cached + uncached`, otpm AS `OTPM`, rpm AS `RPM`, model AS `Model` | SORT `Model` ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS actual_itpm = ROUND((SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens)) / 60, 0), actual_otpm = ROUND(SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) / 60, 0) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT anthropic.usage.model ASC

FROM metrics-anthropic_metrics.usage-* | WHERE anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND anthropic.usage.model IS NOT NULL | STATS actual_itpm = ROUND((SUM(anthropic.usage.uncached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cached_input_tokens) + SUM(anthropic.usage.cache_creation_input_tokens)) / 60, 0), actual_otpm = ROUND(SUM(anthropic.usage.output_tokens) / 60, 0) BY anthropic.usage.model | SORT anthropic.usage.model ASC

sections.title: 🔴 Capacity Headroom — Actual Consumption vs Limit
